auditNotes: INT-043 audit: PLAT-001 и AIS-008 помечены broken — на Production возвращают 404 fallback. AIS-007 (SoloNotification) помечен deprecated — заменён на AISSystemEvent в INT-040 v2. PLAT-002 (Feature Registry) помечен broken — версия устарела (INT-038-v2), требует расширения статусами.

features.name: Adaptive Intelligence Assistant
features.description: Floating AIS button with proactive tips, contextual trust builder, and context prediction

features.name: Confidence Score
features.description: Real-time confidence scoring based on user actions and platform engagement

features.name: Context Prediction
features.description: Rule-based next-action prediction based on page time and navigation patterns

features.name: Adaptive Memory
features.description: Persistent memory of user actions, page visits, and preferences across sessions (localStorage)

features.name: Sound Notifications
features.description: Web Audio API audio feedback for notifications, achievements, tips, and system events

features.name: Personalized Guidance
features.description: Role-based guidance and goal tracking (CEO, CTO, Developer, DevOps, Pentester)

features.name: SOLO LEVELING Notifications
features.description: Branded notification system with glow effects, sounds, and i18n-translated text. DEPRECATED in INT-040 v2 — replaced by AISSystemEvent (cinematic 6-stage animation). File SoloNotification.tsx remains as dead code and should be removed.

features.name: Developer Overlay
features.description: Feature status per page at /app/debug/features, built from Feature Registry. BROKEN on Production: page returns 404 fallback to index.html (HTTP 200, 163356 bytes = index.html size). Source exists in git at /app/debug/features/page.tsx but not in production build.

features.name: Feature Status in AIS
features.description: AIS reads Feature Registry and reports page compliance status to users

features.name: Contextual Help
features.description: Expandable help panels with What/Why/Result for 16 sections on key pages

features.name: Business Result
features.description: Business-oriented result blocks showing ROI, cost savings, and impact

features.name: Executive Summary
features.description: AI-generated executive summary for security posture and business impact

features.name: Section FAQ
features.description: Collapsible FAQ sections on key pages for self-service support

features.name: Smart Next Step
features.description: Intelligent next step recommendations after completing actions

features.name: Visual Flow
features.description: Visual pipeline and workflow diagrams for complex processes

features.name: Smart Scroll Navigator
features.description: Scroll-aware navigation indicator with section dots, progress, and AIS integration

features.name: Demo Badge
features.description: Warning badge indicating demo/mock data on pages

features.name: Term Tooltip
features.description: Hoverable tooltips for security and business terminology

features.name: Why Important
features.description: Context blocks explaining why a feature or metric matters

features.name: Personal Goal Card
features.description: Personalized goal tracking card on dashboard

features.name: Company Progress
features.description: Company-wide security progress indicator on dashboard

features.name: Security Scanner
features.description: Multi-step scan wizard with data source selection, tool selection, pipeline stages, and live execution (client-side engine)

features.name: Scan History
features.description: View past scan results with localStorage data and demo scenarios tab

features.name: Findings List
features.description: Filterable findings with severity badges, detail panels, comments, and assignments (client-side)

features.name: Report Generation
features.description: Generate reports in HTML, JSON, SARIF, Markdown, CSV formats with real file downloads

features.name: Email Report Sharing
features.description: Channel configuration UI — sending is simulated, no real delivery

features.name: Marketplace
features.description: Protection marketplace with categories, search, install/uninstall via client-side engine

features.name: Marketplace Sub-categories
features.description: 8 sub-category pages — all show hardcoded 6-item card grids with no real install logic

features.name: Repository Management
features.description: Repository connection UI — all data is hardcoded mock, no real git operations

features.name: Adaptive Dashboard
features.description: Role-adaptive dashboard with sparklines, risk scores, severity distribution, compliance — all from demo data

features.name: Risk Overview
features.description: Risk list — all 5 items are hardcoded inline, no interactivity beyond display

features.name: Business Language Mode
features.description: Executive-friendly language replacing technical jargon with business terms

features.name: Integration Hub
features.description: Integration catalog with connection forms — toggles are local state only, no real connections

features.name: SSH Key Management
features.description: SSH key wizard UI — all keys and connection tests are simulated

features.name: API Key Management
features.description: API key CRUD with scope selection — client-side only, no backend persistence

features.name: Notification Rules
features.description: Notification rule CRUD UI — rules and history are mock, sends are simulated

features.name: Platform Status Center
features.description: Platform-wide readiness overview with per-module percentages built from Feature Registry. BROKEN on Production: /app/platform-status returns 404 fallback to index.html (HTTP 200, 163356 bytes). Source exists in git but not in production build. A 'ghost' page /app/system-status exists on production instead (81653 bytes, real content) but is missing from git entirely.

features.name: Feature Registry
features.description: Single source of truth for all platform features with honest status tracking. PARTIAL: only 3 statuses supported (implemented/in_progress/planned) instead of required 7 (not_started/in_progress/implemented/verified/broken/missing/deprecated). Needs TypeScript types update and JSON data migration.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Project CRUD with onboarding wizard — backed by client-side engine store, not real API

features.name: Settings Panel
features.description: 9-tab settings — theme/language work; team/SSH/sessions/tokens are all mock data

features.name: Workspace
features.description: Workspace overview — all stats and activity are hardcoded mock data

features.name: Cloud Workspace
features.description: Cloud project management — entirely placeholder with hardcoded data

features.name: Pricing Page
features.description: 3-plan pricing with feature comparison table and working CTA links

features.name: Knowledge Graph
features.description: ReactFlow-based knowledge graph from engine findings with search, filter, node detail

features.name: Attack Paths
features.description: ReactFlow-based attack path visualizer from engine findings with path switching

features.name: Architecture View
features.description: Interactive expandable architecture layers — data from demo-data, not real infra

features.name: Enterprise SSO
features.description: Single sign-on integration for enterprise customers

features.name: Compliance Frameworks
features.description: SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR compliance mapping and reporting

features.name: RBAC
features.description: Role-based access control with granular permissions

features.name: SIEM Integration
features.description: Security information and event management integration

features.name: Audit Trail
features.description: Complete audit trail of all platform actions

features.name: Internationalization
features.description: Full Russian/English bilingual support across all pages and components

features.name: Dark/Light Theme
features.description: next-themes powered theme switching with system preference detection

features.name: Search Modal
features.description: Command-palette search modal accessible from app and landing pages

features.name: System Status Center
features.description: Production-verified platform status page at /app/system-status showing real-time verification of all platform modules with VERIFIED/PARTIAL/FAIL statuses, last-checked timestamps, E2E results, and verification principles (Never Trust Code, No Completion Without E2E, Production Is Source Of Truth, Every Feature Must Have Evidence).

features.name: Evidence Center
features.description: Production evidence registry page at /app/evidence with per-feature verification (screenshots, commit, checks, AIS module-level status, production consistency check LOCAL=GITHUB=SERVER=PRODUCTION). Implements INT-045 BLOCK 1, 5, 6, 7.

features.name: Product Readiness Dashboard
features.description: Product completeness audit page at /app/product-readiness with 16-criteria scoring, Product Debt, Trust findings, UX findings, User Journey, Accessibility, Executive Summary, and TOP-10 Roadmap. Implements INT-046.

features.name: Unified AI Architecture Map
features.description: Main architecture dashboard at /app/architecture showing 4 AI centers (SIP/AIS/AI CTO/AIO) with readiness scores, communication graph, AI routing engine, future agents, unified terminology. Implements INT-048 BLOCK 6.

features.name: SIP Center Detail
features.description: SIP (Security Intelligence Platform) detail page at /app/architecture/sip with 12 modules, KPIs, dependencies, communication links, evidence.

features.name: AIS Center Detail
features.description: AIS (Adaptive Intelligence System) detail page at /app/architecture/ais with 12 modules including Memory/Context/Notification/Sound/Animation/Copilot/Goal/Confidence engines.

features.name: AI CTO Center Detail
features.description: AI CTO (Product Intelligence Center) detail page at /app/architecture/cto with Capability Registry, Product Readiness, Product Debt, Trust Audit, Executive Summary, Recovery Queue, Dynamic Roadmap.

features.name: AIO Center Detail
features.description: AIO (Autonomous Operations Center) detail page at /app/architecture/aio with Build/Deploy/Regression/Evidence/Sync/Recovery/Monitoring/Verification/Rollback modules.

features.name: Command Center
features.description: Unified platform control page at /app/command-center replacing Dashboard. Shows Security Health (SIP), Platform Health, AIS Status, Automation Status (AIO), Recent Activity, Recommendations, Next Actions, Current Goals. Implements INT-049 BLOCK 5.

features.name: Evolution Matrix
features.description: Platform evolution page at /app/evolution showing feature impact map across 4 centers (SIP/AIS/AI CTO/AIO) with stars ratings, Evolution Impact Analysis, AI Copilot Intent Detection demo, Platform Evolution Pipeline. Implements INT-049 BLOCK 1-4.

features.name: Dynamic Two-Level Navigation
features.description: Sidebar restructured with first level (4 AI Centers + Command Center + Evolution + Architecture) and second level (Platform Tools: Scanner, Reports, Marketplace, etc). Implements INT-049 BLOCK 6.

features.name: Dual Mode Navigation (User Workspace + Founder Console)
features.description: Sidebar разделён на две зоны: User Workspace (простой SaaS для пользователя — Scanner, Reports, Marketplace, и т.д.) и Founder Console (инженерный контроль — 4 AI Centers, Evolution, Evidence, Architecture). Переключатель в sidebar. Auto-switch при переходе на founder-страницу. Implements INT-050 BLOCK 2-3-5.

features.name: User Home
features.description: New user-facing home page at /app/home. Only 4 sections: What is happening / What to do / What to check / AI recommendations. No engineering terms (SIP, AIS, AIO hidden). Implements EP-001 BLOCK 4.

features.name: CEO Dashboard
features.description: Business-level dashboard at /app/ceo with MRR/ARR/Trials/Conversion/CAC/LTV/Runway metrics. Commercial Readiness score. Founder mode only. Implements EP-001 BLOCK 6.

features.name: Business Foundation
features.description: CEO Dashboard расширен: North Star Metric (WAS), Sales Pipeline, Revenue Forecast (18 мес), Product-Market Fit assessment (63/100), ICP Distribution (5 profiles). 4 business documents: ICP, Business Journey, Pricing, Value Proposition. Rule 25 (Business Impact First). Implements BP-001.

features.name: Customer Discovery & Market Validation
features.description: CEO Dashboard расширен: Market Validation блок (Confidence Low, 2 интервью, 9 validated problems), Leading vs Lagging Indicators, ICP Evolution. 4 реестра: problem-registry.json (10 problems), assumptions.json (20 assumptions, 11 validated), competitor-evidence.json (5 competitors). Customer interview system: README + template + 2 примера. Rule 28 (Evidence Before Roadmap). Implements BP-002.

features.name: Human First Security Center
features.description: Security Review page at /app/security-review that translates technical findings into business language. AI Executive Summary first, 3-5 actions by business impact, each problem has: what happened / why dangerous / what to do / time. Technical details (CVE, CVSS, ports) hidden in collapsible block. Copy task for developer (Jira/GitHub/Linear). Explain simpler button. Rule 29 (Human-First Security). Implements PX-004.

features.name: Platform Recovery & Source of Truth
features.description: PX-005: Recovery Audit (PX-001..PX-004 verified), Recovery Registry, Hero V3 (5 questions), pricing.ts (single source of truth), SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md, Rules 30-33 (Recovery First, Deployment Report, Evidence Before Conclusion, Repository First). All PX modules recovered and verified.
